text: "Toon" may be a word, but there is no cartoon in the video. It's just a still image, so "toon" wouldn't be the correct word. One definition of "tune" is a short melody, and since there IS a short melody at 0:09, that means that "tune" is the correct word. And also, I looked it up. All trustable sources say that it's "Nazi", Not "Natzi". It seems YOU are the one who needs research. Either that, or you are trolling.

text:
@luteus77 Humble Indie Bundle. It's a site that sells a pack of indie games on occasion. You can pay what you want and the proceeds are split between the games' developers and a few charities. You can choose the split yourself.

HMB4 would be the 4th bundle they sold, and included Cave Story+.
